question: Which customers are at risk of churning?
derivation_sql: INSERT INTO gold_cognimesh.at_risk_customers (customer_id, name, region, days_since_last_order, ltv_segment, total_spend, risk_score) SELECT customer_id, name, region, days_since_last_order, ltv_segment, total_spend, LEAST((days_since_last_order::NUMERIC / 365) * 50 + CASE ltv_segment WHEN 'high' THEN 30 WHEN 'medium' THEN 15 ELSE 5 END, 99.99) FROM silver.customer_profiles WHERE days_since_last_order > 60 OR (ltv_segment IN ('high', 'medium') AND days_since_last_order > 30)
